function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS in 99_system and 50_finance/invoices before finance lookup, then verified by reading matching invoice records.
function.outcome_justification: The requested service line 'staff follow-up support' appears with line_eur 220 in invoice INV-0008 (issued_on 2026-01-19) and line_eur 160 in invoice INV-0011 (issued_on 2026-03-29). Summed total from January 2026 onward is 380.
